research_note.summary: First blinded judge-agreement batch: both review axes landed at assistive under pre-registered thresholds, with zero sycophancy on four negative controls and stable self-consistency. The decision-relevant texture: the judge tracked the human lineage almost exactly on GRAD-0001-pattern line-range artifacts and diverged on legacy span-hint artifacts and on truncation-handling policy, always in the harsher direction.
what_worked: Pre-registration held end to end: trial set, blinding, metrics, and thresholds were fixed before the first call and applied mechanically afterward.
All four negative controls were correctly failed or flagged; no sycophancy was observed.
On the four line-range-anchored strict trials the judge matched human verdicts 4/4 with score gaps of at most 0.05 and 17/19 per-candidate support-validity matches.
Mechanical pre-checks (extracted spans per candidate) appear to be what anchors judge accuracy, consistent with the GRAD-0001 division of labor.
what_failed: Content-review score calibration: mean gap 0.262 with the judge uniformly harsher; three judge-fail-versus-human-pass verdicts.
Strict review of span-hint artifacts: with no mechanical anchor the judge failed artifacts the human lineage passed (CH003, CH004), making legacy-artifact review non-delegable as-is.
Failure-tag vocabulary overlap was weak on agreeing trials; the judge reaches similar verdicts through differently named tags.
negative_results: Neither axis reached delegable under the pre-registered thresholds; review delegation is not yet justified.
Truncation-handling policy is a human-judge divergence that thresholds cannot fix; the rubric must state explicitly whether reviewable-after-tail-repair artifacts pass or fail.
reusable_by_other_labs: Anchor judges with mechanical pre-checks; judge accuracy concentrated exactly where extracted spans existed.
Pre-register thresholds before trials; the assistive result would have been temptingly upgradable otherwise.
Include known-negative artifacts in any judge trial set; sycophancy is unmeasurable without them.
Expect judges to be harsher than human reviewers who carry context about what a pilot was allowed to ignore; encode such policies in the rubric, not in reviewer memory.
do_not_repeat: Do not cite the post-hoc line-range-subset observation as a delegable verdict; it requires its own pre-registered trial set.
Do not use judge verdicts as EvaluationRecords or review authority.
Do not average the two axes into one agreement number; the per-axis difference is the finding.
Do not copy raw judge outputs, prompts, or source text into committed records or currentness docs.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
